//: Declarative APISIX topology for the Mustang proxy — upstreams, services, routes. Edited here and applied with sync-apisix.mjs (idempotent Admin API PUTs); do not hand-edit routes via curl. See mustang-gateway-docs-sandbox-qarorlar.md for the design rationale.

services.name: mustang-mock-prod
services.desc: Live traffic — real Mustang e-invoice service. gw_live_* keys only.

services.name: mustang-mock-test
services.desc: Sandbox traffic — mustang-mock container (fake but correctly-shaped responses). gw_test_* keys only. Extra plugins protect the public docs 'Try it' surface.

limit-count.rejected_msg: Too many sandbox requests from this IP — try again shortly.

routes.name: mustang-test-route
routes.desc: Sandbox — any call whose apikey/Authorization carries a gw_test_ key. Checked before the prod catch-all (higher priority).

routes.name: mustang-prod-route
routes.desc: Catch-all — everything not matched by mustang-test-route (live keys, missing/malformed keys). The gateway still authenticates every call; this route only decides which upstream to reach.
